text.tspan: helper goroutines record per-share pid files asynchronously

svg.text: NormalizeNetwork()\nmerge legacy net_* into net\ndefault backend = passt
generate MAC when omitted\ngenerate vmtap-* only for tap
VmCreate net = vhost_user + vhost_socket + Client\nvirtiofs socket/pid configs
validate run/ is not a symlink
validate service uid/gid and run/ owner + mode
acquire cvmm.pid and remove stale API socket
